name: gstack
description: OpenCode adaptation of gstack with native OpenCode workflows and a fast persistent browser runtime.

scripts.build: bun build --compile browse/src/cli.ts --outfile browse/dist/browse && bun build --compile browse/src/find-browse.ts --outfile browse/dist/find-browse && git rev-parse HEAD > browse/dist/.version && rm -f .*.bun-build || true
scripts.test: bun test browse/test/ test/opencode-*.test.ts test/parity/*.test.ts test/helpers/opencode-run.test.ts test/helpers/static-server.test.ts test/helpers/temp-repo.test.ts
